'''鈭歜-t-s-th''' ('''kabatsethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:anthem|anthem]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-t-s-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:anthem|anthem]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-t-s-th
|-
! Lemma
| kabatsethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibatsethoko|thibatsethoko]] || [[word:jibatsethoko|jibatsethoko]] || [[word:shibatsethoko|shibatsethoko]] || [[word:kibatsethoko|kibatsethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubatsethoko|thuthubatsethoko]] || [[word:jujubatsethoko|jujubatsethoko]] || [[word:shushubatsethoko|shushubatsethoko]] || [[word:kukubatsethoko|kukubatsethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubatsethoko|thubatsethoko]] || [[word:jubatsethoko|jubatsethoko]] || [[word:shubatsethoko|shubatsethoko]] || [[word:kubatsethoko|kubatsethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubatsethoko|thubatsethoko]] || [[word:jubatsethoko|jubatsethoko]] || [[word:shubatsethoko|shubatsethoko]] || [[word:kubatsethoko|kubatsethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebatsethoko|thebatsethoko]] || [[word:jebatsethoko|jebatsethoko]] || [[word:shebatsethoko|shebatsethoko]] || [[word:kebatsethoko|kebatsethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobatsethoko|thothobatsethoko]] || [[word:jojobatsethoko|jojobatsethoko]] || [[word:shoshobatsethoko|shoshobatsethoko]] || [[word:kokobatsethoko|kokobatsethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobatsethoko|thobatsethoko]] || [[word:jobatsethoko|jobatsethoko]] || [[word:shobatsethoko|shobatsethoko]] || [[word:kobatsethoko|kobatsethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobatsethoko|thobatsethoko]] || [[word:jobatsethoko|jobatsethoko]] || [[word:shobatsethoko|shobatsethoko]] || [[word:kobatsethoko|kobatsethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙batsethoko|th忙batsethoko]] || [[word:j忙batsethoko|j忙batsethoko]] || [[word:sh忙batsethoko|sh忙batsethoko]] || [[word:k忙batsethoko|k忙batsethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabatsethoko|thathabatsethoko]] || [[word:jajabatsethoko|jajabatsethoko]] || [[word:shashabatsethoko|shashabatsethoko]] || [[word:kakabatsethoko|kakabatsethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabatsethoko|thabatsethoko]] || [[word:jabatsethoko|jabatsethoko]] || [[word:shabatsethoko|shabatsethoko]] || [[word:kabatsethoko|kabatsethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabatsethoko|thabatsethoko]] || [[word:jabatsethoko|jabatsethoko]] || [[word:shabatsethoko|shabatsethoko]] || [[word:kabatsethoko|kabatsethoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shabatsethithi|shabatsethithi]] || [[word:shabatsethiji|shabatsethiji]] || [[word:shabatsethishi|shabatsethishi]] || [[word:shabatsethiki|shabatsethiki]]
